name: PHIGHTING! but its a Lorebook
description:
[BOT IN PRE-ALPHA ] WOOPS i copy pasted the wrong way... there goes the old bio.... this is the second time this has happened to one of my bots... oopsy...

(NOTE: Proxy is recommended!! Mine works message-per-day, but if yours is by-token I suggest you take caution! Lorebooks may be unoptimized and eat your tokens, mine included I'm a noob!! Takes place with Firebrand MIA/Scorch event! The bot may not work as intended, as it's in a early state and llmisms will llm.)

- INTRO 1: You are not meant to type here! This is a menu for all of the future cmds (they're not working too well yet) but also a library for mass pasting characters into your chats!!

- INTRO 2: You should type here!! This will remain blank for you to type your opening scenarios, make sure to add your characters by mentioning them by name in narrative! (I.E Broker , I wave to Scythe , etc.)

- INTRO 3: This will eventually be a preset scenario taking place in Crossroads to start you off! I want to have one for every region at some point, and they'll all have names at the top that you paste to your reply that append fitting characters to the character definition.

Below is a Index of everything the Lorebook has. In total, it's [49244 Tokens]!! T is short for tokens.
but of course you're not meant to have ALL of them. I'll set total tokens per group presented. Most entries are CASE SENSITIVE so put them in exactly as Intro 1 lists them!
Key:
🔒 <- this means the entry is locked to the character definition!
🔊 <- this means the character is from Soda's streams or other obscure areas! Not an OC!
***
